work_package_result.summary: Added deterministic generation and stale checks for catalogue, coverage, release-gate, test-debt and active-milestone Markdown projections.

passed: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tools/tests: 33 tests

review.method: R1 self-review against WP-M00-005 and testing strategy section 14
findings_closed: Views contain no timestamps or nondeterministic source ordering
Missing, stale and unexpected generated files are reported by exact path
Catalogue implementation paths must exist and remain inside the repository
Two stale scenario paths in the seed catalogue now reference existing fixtures

observability_changes: Check mode distinguishes missing, stale and unexpected generated projections
known_limitations: The initial seed contains 13 M00 cases; full beta catalogue expansion is intentionally deferred
